title: Channel
lead: Channels are the primary inter-coroutine communication mechanism.

sections.heading: Declaration (MUST be const)
sections.after_text: `let ch = new Channel<int>(10)` is a **compile error** for coroutine sharing.

sections.heading: Concurrency rules
bullets: Channels can be captured by `go` closures (exception to shared rule)
Values sent through channel are deep-copied (pointer types)
Channel is reference-counted on system heap
